title: Internal Authority Reduction Log
summary: Fixed ~90 broken internal links in blog posts' relatedCalculators arrays that were pointing to 404 URLs. This reduces crawl waste and improves authority flow to real money pages.

fixes_applied.authority_flow_improvement: Broken links replaced with valid links to money page and supporting calculators
fixes_applied.crawl_waste_reduction: ~90 fewer 404 URLs Google encounters when crawling blog pages
